prd.oneLiner: Connect pay rules, source data, calculation, review, approval, payment, corrections, and audit history.
prd.goal: Reduce payroll calculation errors and maintain 100% completed review before the payment cutoff.
prd.whyNow: Time data, allowances, deductions, change history, and payment-approval evidence are scattered, making payroll errors and employee questions difficult to resolve quickly.
prd.problem: Time data, allowances, deductions, change history, and payment-approval evidence are scattered, making payroll errors and employee questions difficult to resolve quickly.
prd.solution: Connect pay rules, source data, calculation, review, approval, payment, corrections, and audit history.
prd.alternatives: Email, chat, spreadsheets, and manual ledgers
prd.differentiator: Manage intake, processing, and operations data as one connected source of truth.

targets.name: Employee and payroll practitioner reviewing pay statements and settlement results
targets.needs: Quickly register needed work and know its status.
targets.pain: Time data, allowances, deductions, change history, and payment-approval evidence are scattered, making payroll errors and employee questions difficult to resolve quickly.

targets.name: Payroll, tax, and HR operations coordinator
targets.needs: Manage priority and history and review operations metrics.
targets.pain: Time data, allowances, deductions, change history, and payment-approval evidence are scattered, making payroll errors and employee questions difficult to resolve quickly.

targets.name: System and policy administrator
targets.needs: Manage access, policy, and audit history.
targets.pain: Time data, allowances, deductions, change history, and payment-approval evidence are scattered, making payroll errors and employee questions difficult to resolve quickly.

scenarios.text: An operational user registers required work and checks its status.
An operator processes queued work and handles exceptions.
System and policy administrator reviews policy and access.
System and policy administrator reviews audit records and operating metrics.

prd.northStar: Share of operations requests completed on time

kpis.name: On-time processing rate
kpis.target: Reduce payroll calculation errors and maintain 100% completed review before the payment cutoff.
kpis.method: Monthly aggregation of state changes against target dates

kpis.name: Operations visibility
kpis.method: Share of records connected to reporting

inScope: Pay rule, allowance, deduction, time-data, and settlement-request registration
Payee, calculation result, deduction, payment, and adjustment-history lookup
Data collection, payroll calculation, review, approval, payment, and correction handling
Payroll accuracy, payment schedule, deduction, exception, and settlement-status reporting
Pay rule, allowance, deduction, time-data, and settlement-request registration validation and duplicate prevention
nonGoals: Replacing adjacent systems such as accounting or payroll
assumptions: User and organization data are available through company SSO.
Operators manage policy and classification criteria.
risks: Weak initial classification can cause incorrect processing.
Stale source data can reduce operational trust.
openQuestions: What defines urgent processing and approval?
What are the post-completion verification and reopen rules?
constraints: State, owner, and priority changes require audit logs.
Permission, policy, and state changes require audit logs.
